name: GreenLancer
description_short: GreenLancer is a credit repair provider based in Detroit, Michigan. Rated 4.9/5 with 40 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
GreenLancer is a credit repair provider serving clients in Detroit, Michigan. Carrying a 4.9/5.0 Google rating from 40 reviews, GreenLancer has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Detroit area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a civil engineer, contractor, design engineer, GreenLancer provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Detroit, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. GreenLancer operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Detroit, Michigan area who are considering GreenLancer should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
